---
title: 'Worldly Logic'
date: '2013-04-20T04:08:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '7919588712339234948'
blogger_filename: '/2013/04/worldly-logic.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News and Current Events'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/black-backpacks-libral-logic-8088e3dae5fe.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="548" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/black-backpacks-libral-logic-bf17796d69e6.jpg" width="640" /></a></div><br />
